requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and NTON / DGCN-MIFIC Conformity Context
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及NTON / DGCN-MIFIC合格评定环境
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及NTON / DGCN-MIFIC合格評定環境

summary.en: Nicaragua's national standards framework uses NTON technical standards under the national standards and conformity-assessment system, with DGCN-MIFIC as a standards authority context. For EV chargers, a specific official Nicaragua EVSE technical regulation could not be confirmed from the official sources reviewed, so exporters should prepare internationally recognised IEC safety evidence and confirm the NTON / conformity route before import or installation. IEC 61851-1 provides the general conductive EV charging safety baseline, while IEC 61851-23 covers DC EV supply equipment.
summary.zh: 尼加拉瓜国家标准体系采用NTON技术标准，DGCN-MIFIC属于标准主管机构环境。对于电动汽车充电桩，根据已查阅官方来源，未能确认尼加拉瓜专门EVSE技术法规；因此出口商应准备国际认可的IEC安全证据，并在进口或安装前确认NTON / 合格评定路径。IEC 61851-1提供传导式电动汽车充电的一般安全基线，IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车供电设备。
summary.zht: 尼加拉瓜國家標準體系採用NTON技術標準，DGCN-MIFIC屬於標準主管機構環境。對於電動汽車充電樁，根據已查閱官方來源，未能確認尼加拉瓜專門EVSE技術法規；因此出口商應準備國際認可的IEC安全證據，並在進口或安裝前確認NTON / 合格評定路徑。IEC 61851-1提供傳導式電動汽車充電的一般安全基線，IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車供電設備。

standards_or_laws: Nicaragua NTON technical standards and DGCN-MIFIC conformity context
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system general requirements, together with GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication. This evidence may help map design intent, but it embeds China-specific connector and communication assumptions and does not replace IEC 61851 clause evidence or any Nicaragua NTON / conformity-assessment requirement.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统通用要求，并配套GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930-2023直流通信。该证据可帮助说明设计意图，但包含中国特有接口和通信假设，不能替代IEC 61851逐条证据或尼加拉瓜NTON / 合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統通用要求，並配套GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊。該證據可幫助說明設計意圖，但包含中國特有接口和通訊假設，不能替代IEC 61851逐條證據或尼加拉瓜NTON / 合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, protective earthing and residual-current protection documentation, isolation monitoring, interlock and emergency-stop evidence where applicable, IP / IK enclosure test evidence suitable for outdoor tropical conditions, and installation instructions for the Nicaragua utility context. A GB/T 18487 report alone is not enough unless it is mapped to IEC clauses and accepted by the buyer, utility, and conformity route.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、保护接地和剩余电流保护文件、绝缘监测、互锁及适用时的急停证据、适合热带户外条件的IP / IK外壳测试证据，以及面向尼加拉瓜公用事业环境的安装说明。单独GB/T 18487报告并不足够，除非逐条映射至IEC条款并被买方、公用事业单位和合格评定路径接受。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、保護接地和剩餘電流保護文件、絕緣監測、互鎖及適用時的急停證據、適合熱帶戶外條件的IP / IK外殼測試證據，以及面向尼加拉瓜公用事業環境的安裝說明。單獨GB/T 18487報告並不足夠，除非逐條映射至IEC條款並被買方、公用事業單位和合格評定路徑接受。

mandatory_status.target: Confirm route — IEC 61851 evidence is the conservative technical baseline; NTON / DGCN-MIFIC applicability and any mandatory conformity path must be confirmed for the HS code and project
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not a direct Nicaragua safety approval without IEC mapping and local acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 18487 as a design reference only. Nicaragua-facing EVSE files should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence, enclosure protection records, and a confirmed NTON / conformity-assessment route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487作为设计参考。面向尼加拉瓜的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据、直流站IEC 61851-23证据、外壳防护记录，以及已确认的NTON / 合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487作為設計參考。面向尼加拉瓜的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據、直流站IEC 61851-23證據、外殼防護記錄，以及已確認的NTON / 合格評定路徑。
